CREATE TABLE test_table_a (id Int32, valueA Int32);
CREATE TABLE test_table_b (id Int32, valueB Int32);
SELECT a.id FROM test_table_a AS a JOIN test_table_b AS b ON a.valueA = b.valueB WHERE a.id > 1;
SELECT a.id, b.id FROM test_table_a AS a JOIN test_table_b AS b ON a.valueA = b.valueB WHERE a.valueA == 10;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table_a WHERE valueA = (SELECT valueB FROM test_table_b WHERE id = 2);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table_a WHERE valueA == 20) AS a JOIN (SELECT * FROM test_table_b WHERE valueB == 20) AS b ON a.id = b.id;

WITH (SELECT MAX(valueA) FROM test_table_a) AS max_a, (SELECT MIN(valueB) FROM test_table_b) AS min_b SELECT * FROM test_table_a WHERE valueA = max_a AND (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table_b WHERE valueB = min_b) > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT valueA FROM test_table_a WHERE valueA = valueA ORDER BY valueA DESC;
SELECT a.id FROM test_table_a AS a LEFT JOIN test_table_b AS b ON a.valueA = b.valueB WHERE b.id IS NULL AND a.valueA == 10;
